segments.text: I'm Doctor Sravani, calling on behalf of Tata AIA. Am I speaking to Katakamsetti Venkata Jagannath Mohan?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Sir, which language are you comfortable with, sir?

segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay sir, good morning sir. I'm Doctor Sravani, speaking from Tata AIA. Is Katakamsetti Venkata Jagannath Mohan speaking?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, you applied for insurance, right? We're calling for that to do a telephonic medical verification. Mainly in this call, I will ask you some questions related to your health and your habits. If you are able to answer, please note that this is a legal contract. If any wrong statement is made to you or Tata AIA Life Insurance, calculations will be wrong and your rejection will happen. So, give correct answers. This conversation will be recorded for company quality purposes and auditing purposes.

segments.text: Sir, this call will also be recorded for company quality purposes and auditing purposes.

segments.text: 70. High blood pressure, low blood pressure, high cholesterol, triglycerides, lipids, do you have any of these?

segments.text: No, I don't. Actually, recently, when I was working out in the gym, I got a strain, and when I got it diagnosed, they put a stent recently.

segments.text: Recently, they said there was some cholesterol in the report. It's almost 45 days ago.

segments.text: Okay, what kind of blockage was there, sir, then?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Uh, there was no blockage. The nerve had thinned, the doctor said.

segments.text: Is this disease-related, sir? Do you have the report, sir?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Uh, no diseases, they just said the nerve had thinned, and because of that, they put the stent for the passage.

segments.text: No, sir, there must be some blockage, right? Not thin. Hmm... Are you not getting what I'm saying?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, they said there were some blood clots.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, blood clots means... Sir, do you have the report with you, sir? Can you show it to the doctor to see what diagnosis it is?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: The diagnosis was CAD, anterior wall myocardial infarction.

segments.text: Okay, like an attack. Okay, sir.

segments.text: Infarction. I N F A R C T I O N, right?

segments.text: Okay, it was like a heart attack, right sir?
